title: Create buildahimage Dockerfile for Quay
body:
The Dockerfile in the buildahimage directory will be
used by quay.io/buildah when ever a new tag is created
here in this GitHub repo.  It will build a new buildahimage
image automatically.

At least that's the theory.

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Probably need some documentation on how to use this.
LGTM

Yeah a bit of POC at the moment, will add a README.md once the dust settles.  But in short and in theory, quay.io/buildah will point at this Dockerfile and use it to build a new buildahimage every time the GitHub tag for Buildah changes or when we press a button on the quay.io site to build it "by hand".

:pushpin: Commit 6466fe3 has been approved by `vrothberg`
